mapper.select: SELECT * FROM turquoise_knowledge WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO turquoise_knowledge (title, category, content, cover_img, author, view_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{category}, #{content}, #{coverImg}, #{author}, #{viewCount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE turquoise_knowledge SET title = #{title}, category = #{category}, content = #{content}, cover_img = #{coverImg}, author = #{author}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}

UPDATE turquoise_knowledge SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE knowledge_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM turquoise_knowledge WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' ORDER BY category
